name: Material Properties and Applications
description: This cluster of papers encompasses advancements in materials science and technology, focusing on polymer composite materials, carbon fiber reinforced plastics, metal nanoparticles, and their applications in aerospace engineering. The research also delves into synthesis techniques, structural properties, and the use of adhesive joints in various material compositions.

name: Engineering and Material Science Research
description: This cluster of papers covers a wide range of topics in materials science and engineering, including combustion behavior of metals in high-pressure oxygen environments, flammability limits of alloys, seismic performance of structures, soil contamination, and risk assessment. It also includes studies on geotechnical properties and the compatibility of materials with oxygen. The papers reflect a focus on understanding the behavior and performance of materials under various conditions and environments.

name: Metallurgical and Alloy Processes
description: This cluster of papers covers a wide range of topics in materials science and engineering, including alloys, phase diagrams, thermodynamics, nanomaterials, crystal growth, mechanical properties, thin films, solid-state phase equilibria, microstructure, and electrochemical properties.
